sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (`department` String, `employee` String, `salary` UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO employees VALUES ('Engineering', 'Alice Smith', 120000), ('Engineering', 'Bob Johnson', 110000), ('Sales', 'Charlie Brown', 95000), ('Sales', 'David Wilson', 90000);
SELECT employee, salary, last_value(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) AS last_salary_in_department FROM employees;
UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.1 WHERE employee = 'Alice Smith';
SELECT department, last_value(employee) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary) AS last_hired_employee FROM employees;
